source: Asaph Ibn Berechiah - Kitab Al-Ajnas (كتاب الأجناس)
description: Complete named entities: angels, jinn kings, heavens, seals, divine names, and their positions of power

seven_celestial_angels.description: The seven primary angels who govern the seven heavens, each with a seal

angels.name: ميططرون (Metatron)
angels.title: أول خاتم (First Seal)
angels.position: Highest heaven, nearest to divine presence
angels.description: Greatest of the angels, governs the divine chariot. Names taught to Moses, by which Elijah was raised to heaven.

angels.name: رقيائيل (Rapaqel/Raqiel)
angels.title: خاتم رقيائيل الملك
angels.description: الدعوة العظمى لجميع الأرواح — the great invocation for all spirits

angels.name: جبرائيل (Jibra'el/Gabriel)
angels.title: خاتم جبرائيل عليه السلام
angels.position: First heaven, stands at the left side of divine power
angels.description: Angel of revelation, right-hand angel of the throne, governs divine communication. One of the four archangels who stood on Solomon's temple.

angels.name: ميكائيل (Meekaa'el/Michael)
angels.title: خاتم ميكائيل عليه السلام
angels.description: Archangel of sustenance and mercy, guardian of souls. One of the four archangels on Solomon's temple.

angels.name: عزرائيل (Azrael/Israfil)
angels.title: خاتم عزرائيل
angels.position: Third/Fourth heaven, stands at divine power
angels.description: Angel of death, takes souls at appointed time. One of the four archangels on Solomon's temple.

angels.name: سمسمائيل (Samsamaa'el/Shemeshmael)
angels.title: خاتم الملك سمسمائيل
angels.position: Under the heaven of the world, rules jinn and demons
angels.description: Terrestrial king — the White One (الأبيض). Earthly ruler of jinn, governs terrestrial spirits.

angels.name: صرفيائيل (Sorfaya'el/Sarafiel)
angels.title: خاتم الملك صرفيائيل عليه السلام
angels.description: Great benefits and swift obedience. Flying spirits in the air, governs revelation to mankind.

seven_terrestrial_jinn_kings.description: The seven earthly jinn kings (ملوك الأرضية), each ruling a day of the week

kings.name: خندش (Khandash)
kings.title: خاتم خندش
kings.description: Earthly king with specific seal and judgment. Co-king with Nikal.

kings.name: أبا معبد زنبور (Abu Ma'bad Zanbur)
kings.title: خاتم أبا معبد زنبور
kings.description: King with specific seal, helpers, and great benefits

kings.name: ميمون أبا نوح (Maymun Aba Nuh)
kings.title: خاتم ميمون أبا نوح
kings.description: ميمون أبا نوح — Father Noah, good answer, swift obedience. Chief of the Maymun subtypes.

kings.name: الأحمر القرشي (al-Ahmar al-Qurashi)
kings.title: خاتم الأحمر القرشي
kings.description: The Red One of Quraysh, prepared for everything. Great king, swift answer.

kings.name: برقان (Burqan/Barqan)
kings.title: خاتم برقان
kings.description: The Lightning. Great king, swift answer, spirits under his command beyond counting. Ruled by the angel Mikael.

kings.name: شهمورش (Shamhoorash/Shamhurish)
kings.title: شهمورش وعزائمه
kings.description: The Lofty. Swift answer, great obedience, flying spirits. Also called شمهوريش.

kings.name: زوبعة (Zawba'ah)
kings.title: زوبعة وخاتمه
kings.description: The Cyclone/Whirlwind. Great obedience, angel of storms.

four_archangels_of_solomons_temple.description: The four archangels who stood on Solomon's temple (البلاطة) when he made covenant with the spirits

seven_heavens.description: The seven heavens and their ruling angels, each with divine names that created them

heavens.name: السماء الرابعة
heavens.section: الفصل الرابع — في الأسماء التي خلق الله بها ملائكة السماء الرابعة (لزحل)

heavens.name: السماء الثالثة
heavens.section: الفصل الخامس — في الأسماء التي خلق الله بها ملائكة السماء الثالثة (للزهرة)

heavens.name: سماء الدنيا
heavens.section: الفصل السابع — في الأسماء التي خلق الله بها سماء الدنيا (للقمر)

divine_names.description: The divine names (أسماء الله الحسنى) mentioned in the book, with their powers

names.name: اسم الله الأعظم (The Greatest Name of God)
names.power: By which God created all the heavens

names.name: أسماء حملة العرش (Names of the Throne Bearers)
names.power: First obedience — obedience of the throne bearers. When spoken with purity, angels of light descend and heavens/earth tremble.
names.names_foreign: بِهْمِيقَحِ بِجَمَّةِ يَغْفِرِ مِيهِقْرِ مَسِيلِ شُهُونِ شُهُونِ بِجَاهُونِ مَلِيهُونِ
names.names_arabic_meaning: يا الله أنت الواحد أنت الصمد أنت القادر أنت الحي القيوم رب كل شيء

names.name: أسماء سرادقات العظمة والكبرياء (Names of the Courts of Majesty)
names.power: By which God created the angels of the courts of majesty. Spoken by Adam (عليه السلام), by which Jesus (عليه السلام) healed the sick.
names.names_foreign: عنى بيرخ بيروج برخوا شيرخ شاروخ يتمخ شخايا موخ فاسخ شموخ شمخا مخيخا أريخا بيروخا بهيا يا بوما هورياومح مهاروت يا هوه شيمو ملسياميم مقنانا بشفهرز هرازر باروخ شرفيوخ بالوخا

names.name: أسماء عصا موسى (Names of Moses' Staff)
names.power: 31 names on Moses' staff, 10 on each face. One name works miracles, opens locks, breaks magic, binds tongues, defeats tyrants, summons all earthly spirits.
names.names_foreign: لَبْهايَم وبربْتِيَا يا عزيزي مَحْجُجْ سَكْلِعْ

seal_construction_rules.description: Rules for constructing the seven planetary seals

materials.gold: For Sun and Jupiter seals — gold or red agate, Sunday or Thursday
materials.silver: For Moon and Venus seals — pure white silver, Friday
materials.iron: For Mars seals — steel iron, Saturday (for Mimun), Tuesday

seal_construction_rules.timing: First hour after sunrise on the planet's day, in its exaltation
seal_construction_rules.washing: Wash seal with running water and salt after engraving
seal_construction_rules.consecration: Raise (tanjim) the seal according to seal-raising ritual — 7 days
seal_construction_rules.silk_pouch: Place consecrated seal in white silk pouch
seal_construction_rules.incense: Burn appropriate incense when using the seal

solomonic_artifacts.description: Artifacts mentioned in the book that belonged to Solomon (عليه السلام)

artifacts.name: البلاطة (The Tablet)
artifacts.description: The great temple tablet on which the four archangels sat when Solomon made covenant with the spirits

artifacts.name: المندل (The Mandel)
artifacts.description: Solomon's mandel — a tool for summoning spirits

artifacts.name: البساط (The Carpet)
artifacts.description: Solomon's flying carpet — by which he traveled between kingdoms

artifacts.name: خاتم سليمان (Solomon's Ring)
artifacts.description: The ring by which Solomon commanded jinn and wind

prophets_mentioned.description: Prophets and figures mentioned in the book

figures.name: آدم (Adam)
figures.role: First prophet, spoke the names of the throne bearers

figures.name: موسى (Moses)
figures.role: Received the names on his staff, spoke to God

figures.name: عيسى بن مريم (Jesus)
figures.role: Healed the sick with the divine names

figures.name: يوشع بن نون (Joshua)
figures.role: Spoke the names that stopped the sun

figures.name: إيليا (Elijah)
figures.role: Raised to heaven by the divine names

figures.name: سليمان بن داوود (Solomon)
figures.role: Master of jinn and wind, builder of the temple

spirit_types.description: Types of spirits mentioned in the book

types.name: الأرواح الطيارين (Flying Spirits)
types.description: Spirits that fly in the air

types.name: الدناهشة
types.description: A type of spirit — the Snatchers

types.name: الشواخبة
types.description: A type of spirit — the Piercers

types.name: الفرزوقات
types.description: A type of spirit — the Separators
